### Command line interface

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
from ccbr_tools.shell import shell_run
help_msg = shell_run("ccbr_actions --help")
print("```")
print(help_msg)
print("```", end = '\n\n')

# get list of ccbr_actions commands from the help message
help_lst = help_msg.split('\n\n')
commands_idx = [idx for idx,ele in enumerate(help_lst) if ele.startswith('Commands:')][0]
commands = [cmd.split()[0] for cmd in help_lst[commands_idx].split('\n')[1:] if cmd]
for cmd in commands:
    print(f"### {cmd}", end = '\n\n')
    print("```")
    print(shell_run(f"ccbr_actions {cmd} --help"))
    print("```", end = '\n\n')

```
